name: Precise Biometrics AB (publ)
summary: Precise Biometrics AB (publ) develops and sells biometric authentication solutions for people's digital identity and fingerprints in mobile phones and smart cards in Sweden, the United States, China, and internationally. It provides Precise YOUNiQ that secures digital identity for facility access and digital services; Precise BioMatch Card, which enables authentication and storage of the user's fingerprint template in a secure chip on the card; Precise BioMatch Mobile, a fingerprint recognition for smartphones and tablets; and Precise BioMatch Embedded, a fingerprint recognition for Internet of Things, cars, and wearables. The company offers its products to sensor manufacturers, security companies, and system integrators, as well as finance, betting, healthcare, and transport sectors. Precise Biometrics AB (publ) was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Lund, Sweden.
